settings.heading: Protection that runs while you live your life.
settings.lede: Activate instantly, schedule in advance, or let geo-fencing turn Kevin on when you leave. Manage multiple devices and properties from one app.
settings.image_alt: Kevin® device close-up — fabric panel and controls
settings.cta_heading: Pair the app with your Kevin.
settings.cta_subheading: Download the Kevin app after purchase to schedule, geo-fence, and personalize simulations.

settings.heading: Set it and forget it—or take full control.
settings.body: The Kevin app puts scheduling, geo-fencing, and personalization in your pocket. No monitoring panel. No third-party access to your home.

settings.title: Set it and forget it
settings.body: Schedule simulations for weekends, holidays, or daily routines—protection that fits around your lifestyle.

settings.title: Geo-fencing
settings.body: Kevin knows when you leave and starts protecting your space—no taps, no texts, just smart automation.

settings.image_alt: Manage multiple Kevin devices in the app
settings.title: Multiple properties
settings.body: Own several homes, a vacation rental, or business sites? Add a Kevin to each location and manage them all in one app.

settings.image_alt: Kevin® device with personalized sound settings
settings.title: Make it personal
settings.body: Record or upload familiar home sounds. Kevin uses them—and AI-generated household audio—to create a more believable presence that adapts over time to your routine.

settings.title: Smarter sounds with AI
settings.body: Kevin can generate natural household sounds intelligently, adapting over time to your routine and home environment—without cameras or microphones.

settings.heading: Pair the app after unboxing.
settings.body: Download the Kevin app, connect over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth, and confirm firmware is up to date.

settings.title: Download the Kevin app
settings.body: Available for iOS and Android. Search for Kevin by Mitipi in your app store after purchase.

settings.title: Pair your device
settings.body: Follow the in-app guide to connect Kevin over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth. Rename your device if you like.

settings.title: Choose your routine
settings.body: Activate instantly, schedule by day and hour, or enable geo-fencing so Kevin starts when you leave.
